message:
feat(reviews): integrate ReviewList into prompt detail views

Wire up the existing ReviewList component into both the PromptDetailModal
(used for quick-view) and the prompt permalink page (PromptContent). This
makes the V2 reviews system visible to users for the first time.

Part of Ratings & Reviews EPIC (jeffreysprompts.com-9wk9).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
